title: Sabarimala Gold Theft Case: Kerala LoP VD Satheeshan Alleges LDF 'Govt Providing Full Protection to Accused'
description: Congress leader and Leader of Opposition in the Kerala Assembly, VD Satheesan claimed that LDF leaders were involved in the theft of Swami Ayyappa's gold. He further claimed that the accused were able to secure bail only because the charge sheet was not filed on time.
